generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that investing in civil defense preparedness actually strengthens our national security while protecting civil liberties? By ensuring communities are ready for emergencies, we reduce the need for heavy-handed government responses. This balanced approach keeps us safe without sacrificing our freedoms. #PreparednessMatters #SecurityAndLiberty
